themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Moses 'set the bread in order upon' the table (וַיַּעֲרֹךְ עָלָיו עֵרֶךְ לֶחֶם, vaya'arokh al...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַשֻּׁלְחָן֙: the table - a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal".
